notes: React SPA with complex multi-step search form. Location input with autocomplete, date range picker (calendar), guest counter with increment/decrement buttons. Category filter bar with horizontal scroll. Heavy client-side rendering, A/B testing, dynamic content. Cookie banner for GDPR regions.

endpoints.label: Search Form
endpoints.description: Multi-field search: Where (location autocomplete), Check in/out (date picker), Who (guest counter), Search button

endpoints.label: Category Filter Bar
endpoints.description: Horizontal scrollable tabs: Icons, Amazing views, Beachfront, Cabins, Trending, etc. with filter toggle

endpoints.label: Sign Up / Log In
endpoints.description: Profile menu button opening dropdown with Log in, Sign up options. Opens auth modal.

endpoints.label: Cookie Consent Banner
endpoints.description: GDPR cookie consent overlay with Accept/Manage Preferences buttons

endpoints.label: Listing Cards
endpoints.description: Grid of property cards with images, title, price, rating. Links to listing detail pages.

endpoints.label: Become a Host
endpoints.description: Header CTA link to Airbnb hosting onboarding

endpoints.label: Footer Navigation
endpoints.description: Footer sections: Support, Hosting, Airbnb (About, Careers, etc.) with expandable mobile sections
